SHORT NAME: QTYDSPNS 

LONG NAME: QTY_DSPNSD_NUM 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The values for this field are highly variable and depend on the form of the drug that was dispensed 
(e.g., liquids or tablets).
